title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 24 - 2017: Strava in Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog from Boulder, discussing a failed upload the previous night (no sound due to a computer glitch), his ongoing work on a free audiobook website with thousands of pages of book content, and a vision for a large-scale page template that could hold up to a million pages of books. He also mentions his car is ready for pickup but he's waiting until Monday.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Was too tired to redo the video at 2am, blames a computer glitch not user error
Excited about building out a large audiobook/book content website with elaborate page structures
Enthusiastic about an ambitious vision for a hierarchical book template system
Deliberately waiting until Monday rather than picking it up over the weekend

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't upload the video yesterday because there was no sound, possibly due to making it extra wide to show the side.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll use the same background for the video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The background I used last night was strong, but my computer crashed while working on it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was going to do a print around on Boulder, showing different styles of sections by clicking on different folders.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have different sports categories like running, mountain biking, road biking, cycle across, and mountain climbing, but I don't have all of them now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll do a video about the sports categories later.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday, I was working on a good notebook and free audio history books for my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't realize how bad my website was, but I made it look pretty and will fix the links later.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Today, I'm working on the history and education page, and then the Google page, just adding words.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have almost 500,000 pages of books and audiobooks on my list between Kildo and Malibu Luxe.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My website has over a thousand pages just on the chapter contents that I made.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm currently figuring out how many pages the website actually has.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm tying everything up, and it's going to be fun and quick.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday, the sound didn't upload, possibly due to my computer acting weird.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was going to cancel the upload because I found out it was an effort, but I was too tired to redo it at 2 in the morning.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm not as tired now and will work more on some type of videos through Google.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I thought of another cool page template for books, with five columns across, each column having a chapter with 100 pages.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The template could be used for a 1000-page book, with each row representing 10 chapters, totaling 100,000 pages.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I envision a million-page book with a billion characters, but I'll explain it later.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wanted to redo the video yesterday, but Premiere crashed, and I lost the project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My computer is slow, causing issues like not seeing myself while recording and taking an hour to render.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The lesson from last night was to restart the computer, but it's still slow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The sound issue might have been a glitch, not something I did, because I tested the sound.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My car is ready, but I didn't pick it up because it's slow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to work on my voice over the weekend and focus on other tasks on Monday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Calling about the car will help me look cooler.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The video I made is just about six minutes long, but I forgot to check the exact time.

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder V-Logged for the 24th. It's 11.54 at night.
I didn't upload one yesterday because I recorded it and I uploaded it and there was no sound.
So maybe that has something to do with... I made it extra wide to show the side.
I don't know. I think I'll use the same background here too. Oh yeah, the background.
Okay, so this background is Strava.
This one, I did this last night when my computer was acting weird and it crashed right before I was going to do a panorama around Boulder.

It shows sections around Boulder, but I'm showing all the different Strava sections and you can see how I'm like clicking and unclicking the different folders for, you know, I have a different sports running, mountain biking, road biking, cyclocross, mountain climbing and yeah.
And I don't think I have all of them though, but yeah, I'll do a video about that later though.
So for my videos for today, so yesterday I was just saying I was working on Google, I mean no, no, no, free audio history books, which was, my whole website was a mess.
I didn't realize how bad it was, but I made it look pretty and then I'll go back later and fix the links on it.
But just, you know, just make it all look pretty so I know what my website looks like.
And then today I'm working on the history, not on the education page and then the Google page.
Yeah, just adding words.
I'm just about to start adding words.
That's going to be fun.
So yeah, I'm doing a lot.
I found out I have almost 500,000 words, I mean almost 500,000 pages of books, audio books, on my list of the contents of the books between Kindle and LibriVox.
And what's actually on my page is over a thousand pages, just on the chapter contents that I made.
But yeah, I'm in the process right now of figuring out how many pages my website actually has.
I never actually did that, so I'm looking forward to that.
Yeah, tying it all up and it's going to be fun, man.
Oh yeah.
It's going by quickly.
Yeah, so yesterday the sound didn't go up.
I don't know why.
The computer was just acting weird.
I was going to cancel the upload because I found out before, but then I forgot to.
I did the video at like 2 in the morning.
I did it at 1 in the morning and I was like, I got done with all this.
It was at 2 in the morning.
I was just too tired.
I guess I wasn't thinking clearly enough to stop the upload, but I was too tired to redo it, the whole thing.
But yeah, I'm not so tired now.
I think I'll go back and work some more on some typing.
I guess this is super, super, super, super exciting.
I made a thought of another cool page to do.
Well, yeah, well, I want to do a page that's like a template for books, for other books I want to make,
Or if anybody else wants to use my design to put books on.
But you can make one for a 1,000-page book.
You just have, you know, the five columns across, and each column would have its 100, a chapter with 100 pages in it,
And you can go to each page.
So it's just a chapter with, you know, 100 in there.
I kind of like how my Mahabharata page is.
Five across, you know, so two rows.
And so that's 10, right?
And 100, 10 times 100 is 1,000.
And so then you just do another one of those.
Well, that's the one that you would use as the template, but then you can imagine a million words, a million pages,
Because each one of those would be its own book of 1,000.
So I'll explain it later, but that's a cool way to envision.
You know, a million pages.
And in that million pages, it would be about a billion characters.
So anyways, that was, and there's some other pages I'm going to do too, but yeah, bringing it all together.
Yeah, I wanted to redo the video yesterday, but the premiere was crashed on me,
And so I couldn't bring it back.
It was just there and wouldn't come up, so I had to shut it down, and I lost it.
I lost the project.
I mean, I had the two files.
I could have brought them back on, but it took like an hour to render,
Because the computer was acting so slow.
My computer, yeah, not just crashing from recording the Google Earth,
But also when I was recording myself, I couldn't see myself because it was so slow.
So the lesson from last night was restart the computer.
If it's acting slow, restart the computer.
So I think it didn't have sound because of a glitch,
Because it was just overwhelmed or something, not because of something I did,
Because I tested the sound.
Anyways, anyways.
Anyways, so, okay, so tomorrow, yeah, they called.
They have my car ready, but I didn't pick it up today because it's still snowy.
So I'm just going to go through the weekend working on my website now.
The service stuff is so fast.
And then on Monday, I'll call and get the car back,
And I'll go focus on selling the car again, and my website.
Which I think will help me sell the car, make me look cooler.
Okay, so that's enough talking,
Because the video that I made for this is about six minutes.
I forgot to look exactly.
Okay, peace out.
